description: Yefet b. Shelomo b. Yefet b. Nājī, after having acquired 3 out of 24 shares in a house from Efrayim b. Moshe, also known as Nafīs al-Sharābī, grants him the right to purchase them back, under certain conditions, during three years. Two share were paid for on the 27th of Nissan 1557 Sel., and the third one on the 14th of Av of that year. Information from Goitein notes and index card linked below.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
